series.curator_notes: The 'Wieso? Weshalb? Warum?' series spans multiple sub-series targeted at different age groups: main series (ages 4-7), JUNIOR (ages 3-5, shorter episodes), PROFIWISSEN (ages 6-10, in-depth topics), ERSTLESER (early readers, longer content), and Meine Vorlesegeschichten (read-aloud stories). All sub-series are included as they form one cohesive educational brand. Some special episodes like 'Wir entdecken Deutschland' and 'Wir entdecken die Bibel' lack episode numbers but are valid individual releases.

splits.reason: JUNIOR sub-series is targeted at younger children (ages 2-4) with shorter, simpler content. Different branding, target age group, and format from the main series. Parents would expect this to be a separate series entry.
PROFIWISSEN sub-series is targeted at older children (ages 8+) with more detailed, in-depth content. Different branding, target age group, and complexity level from the main series.
ERSTLESER sub-series is specifically for beginning readers with adapted content. Different target group (children learning to read) and distinct branding from the main series.

Meine Vorlesegeschichten is a distinct sub-series with read-aloud stories format, different from the factual/explanatory content of the main series. Released in 2024, this is a newer format targeting parents reading to children.

review.notes:
This series contains multiple distinct product lines from Ravensburger that share episode numbering within their respective lines but are clearly different products: 

1. Main series (Wieso? Weshalb? Warum?) - 60+ mainline episodes
2. JUNIOR (ages 2-4) - 81 episodes, shorter content
3. PROFIWISSEN (ages 8+) - deeper content for older kids
4. ERSTLESER - for beginning readers
5. Meine Vorlesegeschichten - read-aloud stories (2024 release)

The 'duplicate episodes' flagged are not duplicates - they're completely different content from different sub-series that happen to share episode numbers. Each sub-series has its own separate episode sequence.

Gaps [31, 46, 49, 62, 70, 78] were searched but not found on Spotify - these episodes likely don't exist as audio releases.

Two albums without episode numbers are included: 'Wir entdecken Deutschland' and 'Wir entdecken die Bibel' - these appear to be standalone specials and should remain in the main series.

Note: The title 'Der Bauernhof (Wieso? Weshalb? Warum? JUNIOR, Folge 1)' and 'Alles über den Bauernhof (Wieso? Weshalb? Warum? Folge 3)' have similar topics but are completely different content - this is expected as sub-series often cover similar topics at different age levels.

verification.concerns: Spot checks showed album lookups returned errors (likely due to truncated IDs in the input), but the titles and metadata in the curation appear consistent with the series. The first reviewer's reasoning about sub-series being distinct product lines rather than duplicates is sound. All 4 split proposals are justified as they represent genuinely different product lines with different branding and target age Groups.
